user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new acknowledgement terms configuration, so that employees can acknowledge the right document templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Acknowledgement screen; When I click Add new acknowledgement and select location(s) and a template type; Then the acknowledgement configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view acknowledgement configurations with their location(s) and template type, so that I can see which templates apply where
acceptance_criteria: Given acknowledgement configurations exist; When I open the Acknowledgement list; Then each row shows its Location(s) and Template type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing acknowledgement configuration, so that I can keep template mappings up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given an acknowledgement configuration is listed; When I click Edit and change the locations or template type; Then the updated configuration is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to map acknowledgements to different template types such as Offer, Joining, Appointment and Policy Document letters, so that each document requires the correct acknowledgement
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing an acknowledgement; When I choose a template type; Then the configuration applies to that document type

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the acknowledgement list, so that I always see the latest configurations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Acknowledgement screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
